creator: fuz@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 230958
multimedia/py-mat2: update to 0.12.3

Upstream changes:

 - implement code for internationalization
 - keep individual files compression type in zip files
 - increase the robustness of mat2 against weird/corrupted files
 - fix the dolphin integration
 - add a fuzzer

Changelog:	https://0xacab.org/jvoisin/mat2/-/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md

Tested with Poudriere on arm64 FreeBSD 13.

Please MFH if possible.
